name: education digest: cites the source id and fetched_at timestamp for every delta
command:
cat > d.jsonl <<'JEOF'
{"source_id":"dod-scca","section_id":"il5","pillar":"security","curriculum_phase":"5","delta_class":"best_practice_updated","summary":"IL5 boundary update","fetched_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00Z"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
grep -q dod-scca out/2026-06-08T120000Z.md && grep -q 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z out/2026-06-08T120000Z.md && echo cited 1>&2
